author: hbicofbiology
install_msg: Tarot cog loaded! Use `[p]tarot help` to get started.
name: Tarot
description: 78-card Rider-Waite tarot deck with single draws, three-card spreads, Celtic Cross, six custom spreads, reversed card meanings, per-user reading history, daily card with cooldown, card lookup, and per-server admin configuration.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-user reading history and daily card timestamps via Red Config. Users can clear their own data with [p]tarot clearhistory.
